Hardware Component File

MMC_HVAC2_20191218

System Identification and Configuration Data

Metadata

File reference MMC_HVAC2_20191218_20200204T125648.json
Source type JSON Data Array
Status
Validated

Technical Warning

Ensure specific OBD protocol matching before hardware implementation to avoid controller lockout.

Safety Guidelines →

OBD Configuration Details

Protocol CAN
Baudrate 10400
Send ID 18DA98F1
Receive ID 18DAF198
Functional Addr 98
Functional Name HVAC 2

Automatic Identifiers

Array Listing 1 Entries 
[
  {
    "diagversion": "16",
    "supplier": "1111",
    "soft": "11111111112222222222333333333344",
    "version": "11111111112222222222333333333344"
  }
]

Associated Devices

[B2444]Electric Water Pump for Climate System Stuck ID:
[B2445]Refrigerant Gas Leak ID:
[B2446]High Pressure Valve for HVAC Stuck ID:
[P1C03]Battery Cooling Valve Stuck ID:
[P1C04]Cooler Valve Stuck ID:
[P1C05]Heater Valve Stuck ID:
[P1C06]Electric Compressor Stuck ID:

[U1D21]Communication error between HVAC2 and BMS ID:

[P0531]Refrigerant Pressure Sensor Rationality correlation Fault ID:

[P0D6B]Electric Compressor Input Voltage Circuit Low ID:
[P1C00}HVAC2 configuration not completed ID:
